title: The Day Every Human Who Ever Lived Stands in One Place

sound.ambient: deep dark ambience, hollow cavernous air, distant low rumble, cold and still, faint cosmic wind, no music, no melody, no instruments

_note: Afterlife Journey Part 3. No recitation = copyright-free. No em dashes.

segments.sfx: deep low ominous impact, single hollow boom, dark
segments.text: One day, the Trumpet will sound a second time. And the earth… will give back everyone it ever buried.
segments.caption: The Resurrection.

segments.text: From the very first human, to the very last. Every soul who ever lived will rise from the ground. Barefoot. Bare. Exactly as they were first created.
segments.caption: Sahih al-Bukhari; Muslim

segments.text: They are driven to one vast plain. No mountains. No place to hide. Just level ground… and a crowd beyond counting.
segments.caption: Quran 18:47

segments.text: And then… the sun is brought near. Closer than it has ever been. And the people stand, drowning in their own sweat, each by the weight of what they did.
segments.caption: Sahih Muslim

segments.text: For some, the sweat reaches their ankles. For some, their waist. And for some… it will reach their mouths.
segments.caption: Sahih Muslim

segments.text: All of them… waiting. For the one judgment that lasts forever.
segments.caption: Awaiting judgment.

segments.text: Follow for Part Four… when the books are opened.
segments.caption: Follow for Part 4.

segments.text: And if this stirred your heart, let it become a habit. Our app, Ketabi, is a calm home for your faith. Adhkar through your day, a space to reflect, and gentle daily check-ins. Because in the remembrance of Allah… hearts find rest. Begin your journey, at Ketabi Studio dot com.
segments.caption: Download Ketabi.

sources: Quran 39:68; 36:51 - the second blast and the rising
Sahih al-Bukhari 6527; Sahih Muslim 2860 - raised barefoot and bare
Quran 18:47; Sahih Muslim 2864 - the level plain, the sun drawn near, the sweat
